installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.30.3 --activate && pnpm --dir frontend install --frozen-lockfile
buildCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.30.3 --activate && VITE_API_BASE_URL=${VITE_API_BASE_URL:-/api} VITE_WS_BASE_URL=${VITE_WS_BASE_URL:-https://api.socialworld.world} pnpm --dir frontend build
